title: Smartbones 8 Mini Sweet Potato Bones Rawhide Free Chew Dog Treats
description: From the manufacturer Chewy Bones With Delicious Sweet Potato SmartBones are the tempting non-rawhide chews that dogs can’t resist! Our 100% non-rawhide and wheat-free ingredients make SmartBones not only low in fat but easy to digest. Helping to keep your dog healthy and their tails wagging for more! These chews are also vitamin and mineral enriched to ensure that the soft texture of our treats is gentler on gums and tums. The chew bones with sweet potato bones are available in the following sizes: Mini (8 pieces) Medium (2 pieces) Easily Digestable Our 100% delicious chews are easily digestible as they are made with no rawhide. Low In Fat With irresistibly tasty sweet potato inside and vegetables outside - these scrumptious chews are low in fat Promotes Healthy Teeth & Gums SmartBones chews help satisfy a dog’s natural chewing instinct - which promotes healthy teeth and gums No artificial additives Free from artificial colours, flavours and preservatives Discover more delicious SmartBones products: Sweet Potato Chew Bones Buying Options Chicken Chew Bones Buying Options Beef Chew Bones Buying Options Chicken Sticks Buying Options Grill Masters Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,571 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,571 4.6 out of 5 stars 569 4.5 out of 5 stars 884 4.3 out of 5 stars 587 Variants Mini, Medium Mini, Medium, Large Mini, Medium Chicken Sticks, Wrapped Sticks Chicken, Beef, Pork, Lamb Flavours Sweet Potato with Vegetables Chicken with Vegetables Chicken with Beef Flavour Chicken with Vegetables Barbecue Flavour Low Fat ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ No Rawhide ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Vitamin & Mineral Enriched ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔
